feelingEvents.Energetic: Closing on new acquisition, many long hanging fruit, identified new site leader

feelingEvents.Disappointed: Lack of team and preparation for smooth transition, still need to be very hands on.

feelingEvents.Proud: I had my kids assessed and they were inconclusive on adhd but pleasant surprise on their IQ scores. It was not that obvious when comparing to other friends kids I always assume not that smart.
feelingEvents.Thankful: Family needs me and so much love, even tho I travel so much they are very attached to me

family.whyItMatters1: I always put myself and my family down, we are not academics not in our blood, sold ourselves short. We are a work ethic family, scrappy , figure it out types
family.whyItMatters2: My general negative self talk, maybe modeling for my kids the same unconsciously
family.whatIRealize: Need to bring more optimism to family aspect not just career and business aspect, there is a way to have it all… business me, family. Need to be more intentional

me.whatIRealize: I’m adhd but I love building, I assumed I dislike being hands on but with AI I’m hooked, slow but surely making progress

next30.outlook: Smooth transition of new business, how to I get more involved with my kids activities support their development-Lacking, AI progress
